info.title: mvdmio.TranslationTools.Tool
info.description: CLI tool for initializing, migrating, pulling, and pushing TranslationTools manifests.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a .mvdmio-translations.yml configuration file in the current directory

commands.name: pull
commands.description: Pull translations from the API and write project .resx files

options.name: --prune
options.description: Delete local .resx entries and locale files that are absent remotely [default: False]

commands.name: push
commands.description: Push project .resx translations to the API
